ddls:
CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "b_length" INTEGER /* Size of the descriptor in bytes */,
  "b_descriptor_type" TEXT /* Type of the descriptor (e.g., CS_INTERFACE) */,
  "b_descriptor_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the descriptor (e.g., VC_OUTPUT_TERMINAL) */,
  "w_terminal_type" TEXT /* Type of the terminal (constant value) */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the terminal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicator of the descriptor's active status */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_b_descriptor_type FOREIGN KEY ("b_descriptor_type") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("type_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_b_descriptor_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("b_descriptor_subtype") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("type_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal */,
  "terminal_type" TEXT /* Type of the terminal (constant value) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terminal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the terminal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the terminal was last updated */,
  "terminal_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_terminal_type FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_type") REFERENCES terminal_types ("type_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the descriptor */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_versions_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., accessed, modified, created) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_logs_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, integrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource accessed (e.g., descriptor, terminal) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal type */,
  "type_value" TEXT /* Constant value of the terminal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terminal type */,
  "type_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the terminal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor type */,
  "type_value" TEXT /* Constant value of the descriptor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor type */,
  "type_guid" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the descriptor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., length, format, range) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_validation_rules_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "requested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the change */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_change_requests_requested_by FOREIGN KEY ("requested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_change_requests_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)
